Cold Messaging (Plug & Play)
Things to keep in mind:
- Selling the meeting
- Low Commitment
- Only Upside
- Time Stamp
Cold-messaging is a lot less about hit & run like cold-calling. I batch together
cold-emails and cold messages. Expect not to get replies for a while because it’s a lot
easier to ignore a message or email compared to being on the phone with someone
and telling them no or hanging up.
You want to use all available avenues to message a prospective client. This is why it’s
so important to collate as much information as possible earlier in the process.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Before You Start:
Acuity Scheduling/Scheduling Page
You should already have your acuity scheduler with the 30-minute appointment
type and your Zoom meeting ID in the confirmation email set up. This should be
embedded on the scheduling page within that template website I gave you.
This way, your scheduler is available for them to automatically book in a time on a
nice clean page that has your video instructions. Your website has the pixel on there
so the best thing is that even if this potential client falls through or doesn’t book, you
can always just re-target them later.
Mailtrack:
This chrome extension will show you if an email has been read by a prospective
client. This is amazing because it gives you context as to how aggressive you can be
with the follow up and also how to go about approaching it.
It works with a few different email providers but if you followed prior instructions -
you should be using it with Gmail. With Gmail it works like a charm and the interface
is super clean. Click HERE to install.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

Cold Messaging (Plug & Play)
Where to message:
1. Email - This is an absolute guarantee that it’ll reach the prospective client and
they’ll see the email in their inbox. It’s not super likely that they’ll properly read
the email or even respond though. Most people’s email inbox is so
disorganised. This is still the most effective means for most people though.
2. Facebook - You should be finding leads through all the methods I showed
you a few modules ago. If it’s through the Facebook group method, add them
as friends and send them a message to with the first message template. If you
find a lead some other way, you should still add them on Facebook.
3. LinkedIn - The platform that I’m definitely weakest at, but tons of people kill it
with. You can use LinkedIn to send a connection request and then carry on
the messaging funnel from there.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Messaging Funnel:
This is a 5-step messaging funnel. I’m going to give you some guidelines but you
MUST change the actual emails or you’ll end up failing. Thousands of students are in
this course, so if you try to just use the exact same messages/emails the business
owners will think you’re spammy and just ignore you.
Also remember you need to adapt the message if it’s on email compared to
Facebook/LinkedIn
Message 1:
Hey Dany! I saw something that was a little concerning regarding your current
online marketing. I think you’re leaving a lot of money on the table.
This is just one business owner being honest to another business owner.
I actually run an agency where we help our gym clients bring in 10-15 new
memberships a month using Facebook Ads.
After a quick audit of your online marketing, I know we can achieve the same for
you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

Cold Messaging (Plug & Play)
Let’s pencil in a quick 30 minute call to discuss how I can bring you a steady stream
of new customers. At the end of this call, either we can move forward or you can
literally just steal everything I show you and apply it yourself. Either way, no
downside and only infinite upside.
Let me know what time works for you this week or conversely just pick a time from
my scheduler and it’ll automatically add to both our calendars:
*Scheduler Page On ClickFunnels*
Looking forward!
Message 2:
At this point you need to check whether or not they’ve opened the message/read
the email and change the copy accordingly.
So I noticed you didn’t {see/reply} to my last {email/message}. I don’t blame you!
Haha
I bet you get people reaching out to you all the time.
But this is different…
Because as I said, at the end of our super quick conference call… you’ll either walk
away with a new partner that will skyrocket your business’s revenue, or a FREE
road-map that you and your team can apply themselves.
I don’t mind which one it is, I just hate to see a business leave money on the table.
So let’s make sure this is a win/win for you. Here’s a link to my scheduler:
*Scheduler Page On ClickFunnels*
Message 3:
Now we’re going to convey some value with a quick 2-3 minute Loom so they can
get a sense of our voice and the value we bring to the table.
I understand you probably got a lot on your plate and don’t want to waste your time.
That’s why before our conference call I wanted to give you one actionable tip that
you can apply TODAY.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Cold Messaging (Plug & Play)
I shot a screen recording, only a few minutes long. It goes over what sort of ads your
competition is running and how to find out exactly what ads they’re running and
how long have they been running!
Here’s a link to the video: {LOOM LINK}
Anyways, as you can see your competitors are running ads. They’re actively stealing
more of the market share.
I’d love to help you make sure we put an end to that this week.
So let’s book in a time and make this happen. Here’s a link to my scheduler:
*Scheduler Page On ClickFunnels*
Message 4 {Only Send If You Have Testimonial}:
Now we’re going to send a video testimonial from one of our clients to build on the
social proof.
You might be wondering who is this guy? Who does his agency work with? Are they
any good?
I wanted to send you a quick testimonial from one of clients Amanda.
We were able to get her 80 free week gym trails on Facebook for less than $900 in
ad spend. This equated to 15 new memberships for her gym with a lifetime value
combined of $18,000.
Here’s what she had to say about us:
{VIDEO TESTIMONIAL}
Message 5:
This is going to be our last attempt at reaching out to this client and making the
meeting happen. A lot of times you’ll send this last message with no response and
5-6 weeks later they actually come back to book in.
Dany, I’ll stop here. Last message I promise.
All I have to say is that this 30 minute video conference could change the course of
your business for the next 30 years. Adapt or die. Your competitors are using
Facebook Ads to get ahead of you. You can’t let them get that advantage.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Cold Messaging (Plug & Play)
I don’t know if you’re the right fit to work with us yet, but I would definitely love to
find out over our video conference.
This is the last message I send you. Whether it’s with us or another agency, I really
hope to see you growing your business with Facebook Ads before your competition
keep getting an unfair advantage.
Dany, let’s set up this call and take things to the next level:
*Scheduler Page On ClickFunnels*
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Refining The Messaging Funnel:
It’s really all about refining these messages/emails and really showing that you’ve
done adequate research on the company.
I know there’s agency that bang out thousands of cookie cutter messages but I’m
not super into that. I would rather hone in on a prospect I really think would be a
good fit and do everything I can to make that a success.
I really cannot re-state just HOW crucial it is that you make these messages/emails
your own. You really need to reword them and restructure them to suit your
personality and also so you don’t send them same message and the other thousands
of students in this course.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
